stemHtml: Suspecting the landing gear isn't fully extended, you want a tower fly-by to check. What should you report?

options.a: PAN PAN x3, [Tower] [Callsign], gear not properly jammed, request low approach for check.
options.c: PAN PAN once, [Tower] [Callsign], gear issue, request low approach.
options.d: MAYDAY x3, [Tower] [Callsign], gear not jammed, request low approach.
